title: Service on sabbatical leave as active service for retirement purposes
doc_html:
§1181.  Service on sabbatical leave as active service for retirement purposes

Service on sabbatical leave shall count as active service for the purpose of retirement and contributions to the retirement fund shall be continued.
doc_text:
§1181.  Service on sabbatical leave as active service for retirement purposes
Service on sabbatical leave shall count as active service for the purpose of retirement and contributions to the retirement fund shall be continued.
